notes: The exact model number "PT20X-SDI-GY-G3" does not exist in PTZOptics' product lineup. PTZOptics' SDI camera line only reached G2 generation under that naming convention (PT20X-SDI-GY-G2). The G3 generation SDI cameras use a different naming scheme: PT20X-SE-GY-G3 (Move SE, 1080p) and PT20X-4K-GY-G3 (Move 4K). B&H Photo Video explicitly lists PT20X-4K-GY-G3 as the replacement for PT20X-SDI-GY-G2. This entry uses data for the PT20X-SE-GY-G3 (Move SE, the 1080p G3 SDI camera) as the closest real product matching the queried name. If the intended product is the 4K variant, use PT20X-4K-GY-G3 instead. HDMI is rated version 1.3 per the spec sheet; mapped to hdmi-1.4 grade as the nearest available enum value. RS-232 ports use 8-pin Mini-DIN physical connectors, not DE-9. Confidence is medium because the queried model number does not exist and the data is sourced for the closest real equivalent.

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Spec sheet states HDMI version 1.3; mapped to hdmi-1.4 as the closest grade in the enum (1.3 is functionally equivalent and predates the 1.4 designation)

ports.name: LAN / PoE
ports.note: 10/100M adaptive Ethernet port; supports PoE 802.3af for power input

ports.name: RS-232 In
ports.note: 8-pin Mini-DIN physical connector (not DE-9); VISCA/Pelco-D/Pelco-P, max 30m

ports.name: RS-232 Out
ports.note: 8-pin Mini-DIN physical connector (not DE-9); VISCA/Pelco-D/Pelco-P, max 30m — used to daisy-chain cameras

ports.name: DC 12V In
ports.note: JEITA-type DC 12V, 2A max; included AC adapter
